channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Saudi's sovereign wealth fund wants the kingdom to become a global investment center
item.description: After deploying billions in capital worldwide, Saudi Arabia now aims to attract global investment to the kingdom.

item.title: Markets tumble worldwide as Fed resets expectations: $400 billion wiped off SpaceX stock
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Saudi Aramco's chairman calls for 'energy realism'
item.description: As the world grapples with the greatest oil shock in history, Saudi Aramco's chairman calls for 'energy realism'.

item.title: Cooley CEO warns Big Law will not survive if AI is treated only as an efficiency tool
item.description: The billable hour is weakening, and law firms must choose to redesign their business around AI or let others decide their future.
